title: Popover component for picking between multiple symbol definitions
purpose: Displays a portal popover listing definition candidates for a clicked symbol, allowing users to select one to navigate to. Positions itself relative to the clicked symbol.
module_context: Exports a React functional component DefinitionPickerPopover that accepts candidates, symbol name, anchor rectangle, and callback handlers. Includes helper function basename for file path processing.

steps.content: Split the input path string by forward slashes.
Return the last element of the split array or the original path if empty.
Initialize a ref for the popover container element.
Calculate and memoize the popover position based on the anchor rectangle.
Set up a document mouse event listener to close the popover on outside clicks.
Set up a document keydown event listener to close the popover on Escape key.
Set up a window scroll event listener to close the popover on scroll.
Construct the popover UI with header and body sections.
Render each candidate definition with file path, line number, and export status.
Return the popover wrapped in a React portal attached to the document body.
